title: TrafficMonitor Installer
problem: Users need live CPU, RAM, GPU, disk and network speed visible on the taskbar.
solution: One-command PowerShell installer that downloads, configures and starts TrafficMonitor automatically.
description: Install and configure TrafficMonitor for live system monitoring in the Windows taskbar.
technology: PowerShell, GitHub Pages, Windows Scheduled Task

title: TrafficMonitor Deep Cleaner
problem: Users need to completely remove TrafficMonitor files, startup entries and configuration leftovers.
solution: Deep cleanup script with confirmation before removal.
description: Remove TrafficMonitor startup entries, scheduled tasks, configuration files, folders and leftovers.

title: CyberSabil IT Tools EXE
problem: IT support users need one dashboard for common Windows support tools.
solution: Standalone Windows EXE with shortcuts, diagnostics and admin utilities.
description: Standalone CyberSabil IT Tools dashboard for Windows support and troubleshooting.

title: Network Fix Tool
problem: Users face internet, DNS, gateway and adapter issues but do not know where the problem is.
solution: One-command network diagnostic and repair helper.
description: Check DNS, gateway, adapter, internet reachability and common Windows network issues.
